tool.name: replay_list_scans
tool.description: List all replayable scan sessions (from checkpoints).

tool.name: replay_get_events
tool.description: Load a paginated window of events for replay scrubber. Returns tool executions + status transitions sorted chronologically.

tool.name: replay_add_bookmark
tool.description: Add a bookmark at a replay scrubber position — for easy jump-back during review.

tool.name: replay_list_bookmarks
tool.description: List saved bookmarks for a replay session.
